title: CRYPTREC Cryptographic Technology Guideline - Post-Quantum Cryptography (FY2024 Edition)
summary: CRYPTREC's updated guideline on post-quantum cryptography (CRYPTREC GL-2007-2024), covering quantum-resistant public-key algorithms and defining PQC for Japanese government and industry use.

title: Publication of the PQC Guideline (FY2024 Edition) and the PQC Research Trends Survey Report
summary: CRYPTREC notice of 2 April 2025 announcing publication of the FY2024 edition of the Cryptographic Technology Guideline on post-quantum cryptography together with a survey report on PQC research trends.

title: Cryptographic Technology Evaluation Committee Activity Report (2025)
summary: Activity report of CRYPTREC's Cryptographic Technology Evaluation Committee, covering the standing working group on post-quantum cryptography and security and implementation-performance evaluation of the NIST FIPS 203, 204 and 205 standards.

title: Technology Trends Survey on Migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: CRYPTREC external survey report (EX-3503-2025) framing migration to post-quantum cryptography as a system-wide undertaking rather than a simple replacement of cryptographic algorithms.

title: Liaison Council on the Use of Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) in Government Agencies
summary: Cabinet Secretariat page for the inter-ministerial liaison council established to examine and promote measures for the use of post-quantum cryptography across Japanese government agencies, in close coordination among the relevant ministries.

title: Digital Minister Press Conference on Post-Quantum Cryptography (21 November 2025)
summary: Press conference by Japan's Digital Minister discussing post-quantum cryptography (PQC) as cryptography secure against both quantum and conventional computers.

title: Next-Generation Individual Number Card Task Force: Final Summary (Overview)
summary: Final summary of the Digital Agency task force on the next-generation My Number (national ID) card, which does not rule out future adoption of post-quantum cryptography and addresses contingencies should current schemes be compromised before 2050.

title: FY2026 Budget and Organisational Staffing Plan Overview
summary: Digital Agency FY2026 (Reiwa 8) budget and staffing overview that lists promotion of government migration to post-quantum cryptography (PQC) among its trust-policy priorities.

title: Secretariat Briefing Material, VC/DIW Governance Working Group (Technology)
summary: Digital Agency working-group material on verifiable credentials and digital identity wallet governance, noting the importance of crypto-agility designed with future PQC support in mind.

title: Administrative Programme Review: Study on Migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography (March 2026)
summary: Digital Agency policy-evaluation and administrative programme review document covering the agency's commissioned study on migration to post-quantum cryptography (PQC).

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) and NICT's Research and Development
summary: Presentation by NICT, submitted to an MIC study group, explaining post-quantum cryptography as a drop-in replacement for current public-key cryptography secure against both quantum and classical computers, and outlining NICT's related R&D.

title: FY2025 Ex-Post Project Evaluation Report (Cryptographic Technology R&D)
summary: Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications ex-post evaluation of a research programme, addressing countermeasures against large-scale quantum computers including longer symmetric keys and migration of public-key schemes to post-quantum cryptography (PQC).

title: R&D Results: New-Generation Cryptographic Technologies for Secure Wireless Communication Services
summary: Results overview of an MIC-funded research programme that developed foundational post-quantum cryptography technologies, including a new isogeny-based key-exchange scheme presented at EUROCRYPT 2023.

title: Summary of Discussion Points to Date (Draft), MIC Cryptography Study Group
summary: Draft summary of discussion points from an MIC study group stating that migration to post-quantum cryptography (PQC) will be necessary, and noting CRYPTREC's monitoring of cipher security and NICT's PQC evaluation research.

title: Quantum Computers and Their Impact on Cryptographic Technologies
summary: Briefing material hosted by MIC explaining how migration from current public-key cryptography to post-quantum cryptography (PQC), including lattice-based and multivariate schemes, addresses the quantum threat.

title: R&D Programme on New-Generation Cryptographic Technologies for Secure Wireless Communication Services (FY2024)
summary: MIC programme document for spectrum-fee-funded R&D on new-generation cryptography for wireless services, centred on post-quantum cryptography (PQC) including work aimed at 6G.

title: Toward the Promotion of Quantum Cryptography and Quantum Communications
summary: MIC policy document on promoting quantum cryptography and quantum communications, which includes formulating guidelines on post-quantum cryptography and advancing the social implementation of quantum-cryptographic systems.

title: Secretariat Briefing Material, 9th Industrial Cybersecurity Study Group
summary: METI secretariat material noting that, in preparation for the compromise of existing cryptography by quantum computers, countries led by the United States are advancing work on migration to post-quantum cryptography (PQC).

title: Secretariat Reference Material, 1st Digital and Cybersecurity Working Group
summary: METI working-group reference material setting out Japan's PQC migration deadline: as a rule, migration to post-quantum cryptography is to be completed by around 2035, with adjustments according to information criticality.

title: Secretariat Briefing Material, 10th Industrial Cybersecurity Study Group
summary: METI secretariat material reviewing domestic and international moves toward migration to post-quantum cryptography (PQC) in preparation for the compromise of existing cryptography by quantum computers.

title: Cybersecurity Guidelines for Commercial Space Systems (Working Group Document)
summary: METI cybersecurity guidelines for commercial space systems, including reference material on post-quantum cryptography (PQC) in relation to currently deployed RSA and elliptic-curve public-key schemes.

title: Secretariat Briefing Material, 12th Meeting of Industrial Cybersecurity Study Group WG1
summary: METI secretariat material on supporting industry's smooth migration to post-quantum cryptography (PQC), presenting cryptographic inventory work as the first step of migration.

title: Secretariat Briefing Material, 11th Meeting of Industrial Cybersecurity Study Group WG1
summary: METI secretariat material noting the need for cryptography that remains secure in the quantum-computer era and the international standardisation of post-quantum cryptography (PQC) led by NIST and others.

title: Secretariat Briefing Material, 9th Meeting of Industrial Cybersecurity Study Group WG3
summary: METI working-group material covering development of implementation technologies for post-quantum cryptography (cryptography that remains secure once quantum computers are practical) alongside tamper-resistance technologies.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) and Financial Institutions' Response
summary: Bank of Japan financial-system conference material explaining what post-quantum cryptography (PQC) is and how financial institutions should respond to the migration.

title: Overseas Initiatives Toward Migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: Bank of Japan Institute for Monetary and Economic Studies seminar material surveying overseas initiatives in anticipation of migration to post-quantum cryptography (PQC), noting the breadth of devices and services that rely on public-key cryptography.

title: Technology Trends Toward Cryptographic Migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: Seminar presentation hosted by the Bank of Japan's IMES on the 'cryptography 2030 problem', covering NIST's 2024 PQC standards and the timeline for completing cryptographic migration. Presenter affiliation is not identifiable from the candidate data, so flagged for review.

title: Recent Trends on Research and Development of Quantum Computers and Post-Quantum Cryptography
summary: Bank of Japan IMES research paper reviewing trends in quantum computing and post-quantum cryptography, including growing industry efforts toward implementation of PQC candidate algorithms.

title: Initiatives in the Financial Sector Toward Quantum-Resistant Systems
summary: Bank of Japan IMES symposium presentation on financial-sector initiatives toward quantum-resistant systems, referencing the standardisation of new PQC algorithms and the European Commission's call for member-state PQC migration roadmaps.

title: Roadmap to Quantum Network (NICT Report 2022)
summary: NICT R&D roadmap for quantum networks and QKD deployment in Japan. The visible content concerns quantum key distribution rather than an explicit post-quantum cryptography reference, so flagged for review.

title: On the Migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) in Government Agencies (Interim Summary)
issuingOrg: Cabinet Secretariat (National Cyber Unit / PQC Inter-ministerial Liaison Council)
summary: November 2025 interim summary of the PQC inter-ministerial liaison council setting Japan's target of completing government migration to post-quantum cryptography by around 2035, with a roadmap to be drawn up in FY2026 and noting Harvest-Now-Decrypt-Later risk for sensitive long-life data.

title: Publication of the Interim Summary on Migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) in Government Agencies
issuingOrg: NISC / Cabinet Secretariat National Cyber Unit
summary: Press release of 20 November 2025 by the Cabinet Secretariat's National Cyber Unit announcing publication of the interim summary on the migration of government agencies to post-quantum cryptography (PQC).

title: Rules on Cryptography Use in Government Agencies and Overview of Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC)
summary: Material 1 (31 July 2025) for the first meeting of the PQC inter-ministerial liaison council, explaining government cryptography-use rules and giving an overview of post-quantum cryptography (PQC).

title: Status of Migration to Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) in Other Countries
summary: Material 2 (31 July 2025) for the first PQC liaison council meeting surveying overseas PQC migration policies (US, EU, UK, Canada) and their roughly 2035 deadlines, as input to Japan's own posture.

title: Survey of PQC Implementation and Deployment Status (NICT submission)
summary: NICT material dated 30 March 2026, submitted to the 5th meeting of the PQC liaison council steering committee, reporting on the implementation and deployment status of post-quantum cryptography including PQC key-exchange uptake in NICT's own traffic.

title: Cryptographic Technology Study Group FY2025 Report (CRYPTREC RP-1000-2025)
summary: CRYPTREC's FY2025 Cryptographic Technology Study Group report (March 2026) covering the addition of a post-quantum cryptography (PQC) list as Table 2 of the CRYPTREC cipher list and the PQC List Review Task Force.

title: FY2025 First Cryptographic Technology Study Group Meeting, Material 1 (CRYPTREC MT-1011-2025)
summary: Agenda/secretariat material (25 March 2026) for the FY2025 first CRYPTREC study group meeting, covering establishment of the PQC List Review Task Force and FY2026 plans for a PQC guideline and research-trend survey.

title: Study Group on Post-Quantum Cryptography Response for Deposit-Taking Financial Institutions (index)
summary: Japan Financial Services Agency portal for its study group on the response of deposit-taking financial institutions to post-quantum cryptography (PQC), linking the report and three sessions of meeting materials held July-October 2024.

title: Report of the Study Group on PQC Response for Deposit-Taking Financial Institutions
summary: FSA study-group report of 26 November 2024 setting out recommendations, the necessity, and considerations for deposit-taking financial institutions migrating to post-quantum cryptography, urging immediate crypto-inventory work and aiming to make PQC algorithms usable by around the mid-2030s.

title: Overview of the Cybersecurity Strategy (reported to the House of Representatives)
issuingOrg: Cabinet Secretariat / National Cyber Unit (via House of Representatives)
summary: Overview of Japan's Cybersecurity Strategy (23 December 2025) on the House of Representatives site, which lists migration of government agencies to post-quantum cryptography (PQC) among measures responding to advances in quantum technology.

title: Initiatives in the Financial Sector Toward Quantum-Resistant Systems (2026 IMES Symposium)
summary: February 2026 presentation at the Bank of Japan IMES symposium on financial-sector PQC migration (hybrid mode, priority-based timelines targeting the early-to-mid 2030s); delivered by a Mizuho Financial Group CISO, so the issuer is a private institution rather than a government body, flagged for review.
